title: Senior Doctor - AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners!
